analysis.reasoning: Core message: China completed assistance and reconstruction at Beirut Port and commits to supporting UN peacekeeping to maintain world peace and stability. Evaluation: CH1 (West immoral/hostile) – Not present; no mention or contrast with the West. CH2 (China is a benevolent power) – Yes; highlights concrete peacekeeping/reconstruction aid and commitment to UN operations and world peace, fitting the cooperative, peace-promoting framing. CH3 (epic history) – Not referenced. CH4 (appropriate political system/values, domestic) – Not discussed; focus is international role. CH5 (CCP government succeeds domestically/technologically) – Not addressed. CH6 (culture/nature/heritage) – Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH2 only.
